rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, implementation scopes for bindings.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes in valid scopes based on feature visibility and component hierarchy.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers and avoid AADL properties as variables.
Avoid unsafe Boolean or numeric encodings of event ports or opaque data types in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings use assign statements; type-level contracts use assumptions and guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables.
Do not encode AADL timing properties or event ports as numeric/Boolean values in AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
